arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund register interest in second Barcelona player
arts.sum: Barcelona look set to be busy this summer, as in order for signings to be made, there must first be sales. And at this stage, there is a new name that has emerged as someone that could move on. Barcelona have struggled at left-back at times this season, but despite this, it was agreed that […] The post Borussia Dortmund register interest in second Barcelona player appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Easter Sunday's Bundesliga predictions including Borussia Dortmund vs. Borussia Monchengladbach
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Borussia Dortmund vs. Borussia Monchengladbach.

arts.ttl: How do Borussia Dortmund and Borussia Mönchengladbach stack up?
arts.sum: Both have been in excellent form this season, with 15 Bundesliga goals apiece, although Kleindienst also has five assists (compared to Guirassy's one). With just two points separating the two Europe-chasing Borussias ahead of their Matchday 30 meeting, bundesliga.com takes a look at how Dortmund and Mönchengladbach compare.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund v Borussia Mönchengladbach preview: Borussias lock horns with Europe in mind
arts.sum: Dortmund host Gladbach on Sunday with both teams hoping to qualify for Europe.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund scramble to activate Daniel Svensson’s automatic purchase option
arts.sum: Sky Germany is currently reporting that Borussia Dortmund will work to trigger an automatic purchase clause in the case of Swedish fullback/wingback Daniel Svensson.
